Component.name: Pulsing
Component.Description:
Applies a smooth pulsing scale animation to an entity using a sine wave. Demonstrates a pure Kotlin SpatialFeature without native code.
The pulsing effect oscillates the entity's scale between minScale and maxScale: scale = minScale + (maxScale - minScale) * (0.5 + 0.5 * sin(2π * frequency * time))
Usage: entity.setComponent(Pulsing( minScale = 0.8f, // Scale down to 80% maxScale = 1.2f, // Scale up to 120% frequency = 0.5f // 0.5 cycles per second (2 second period) ))
Attributes: - minScale: Minimum scale multiplier (default 0.8) - maxScale: Maximum scale multiplier (default 1.2) - frequency: Oscillation speed in Hz - cycles per second (default 1.0)
